_comments.openai_api_key: Paste your OpenAI API key here
_comments.model: Any OpenAI chat model, e.g. gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini, gpt-3.5-turbo
_comments.repositories: List of local git repos to monitor. name = display label, path = absolute path on disk
_comments.schedule_minutes: How often to check for new commits (in minutes). Set to 0 to run once and exit.
_comments.lookback_commits: Max number of recent commits to process on first run per repo
_comments.dashboard_port: Local port for the web dashboard
